title: Be My Valentine
description: Aim this Valentine’s bubble bar at the one you want to win over and they're sure to be lovestruck by these beautiful bubbles of elegant rose and refreshing lemon.
ingredients: Citrus Aurantium Bergamia Fruit Oil (Bergamot Oil)

images.alt: Be My Valentine. A bright pink, heart-shaped bubble bar with a wooden craft stick pierced through the centre like an arrow, and the front of the heart is decorated with a small cluster of tiny red hearts.
The image shows a pink heart-shaped bubble bar on a wooden stick sitting on a pink podium. It is decorated with small red hearts in the centre and set against a pink curtain with a heart spotlight.

The image shows a hand holding the pink heart-shaped Be My Valentine bubble bar by the wooden stick under a stream of water. The product is held over a tub of pale pink, bubbly bathwater as it begins to dissolve.

A hand holds the pink heart-shaped Be My Valentine bubble bar on a stick under a stream of water. The bubble bar is held over a tub of pale pink, bubbly bathwater as it begins to dissolve, creating a deeper pink.

A hand holds the pink heart-shaped Be My Valentine bubble bar on a stick under a stream of water. The bubble bar is held over a tub of pale pink, bubbly bathwater as it begins to dissolve, creating a deeper pink.

A close-up, aerial view of a thick layer of pale pink bubbles and foam covering the surface of the bathwater, created by the Be My Valentine bubble bar. The bubbles vary in size, creating a dense, frothy texture with soft pink hues.
